01 · Wordmark

FORMA

Archivo Expanded, weight 800, set tight. The full stop is a round flamme dot: the brand's entire decoration and the seed of the orb system, the smallest member of the same family that runs through the whole product. A statement of finality, a period of peak condition. Forma. As in: on it.

Primary

FORMA

Reversed / Carbon

Tracked / Editorial

02 · Palette

Ink#0B0B0C
Paper#FAFAF7
Chalk#F0F0EC

Carbon#101012
Flamme#FF3D00
Z1
Z2
Z3
Z4
Z5
Z6
Z7

Monochrome carries the brand; Flamme (from the flamme rouge, the 1km kite) is the only accent and it is spent carefully: the wordmark's full stop, the live target, the thing that matters most on the page. Zone colours are re-cut as a race-graphics ramp, cold blue to boiling red, and are the only saturation inside the product.

The monogram is the wordmark cut to its first letter, full stop retained. On the home screen it reads as a quiet black tile in a sea of loud icons, which is exactly the point.

03c · Accent trials, in context

Base phase · 38 days to Nationals

+7▲

FLAMME #FF3D00 · RECOMMENDED

Base phase · 38 days to Nationals

+7▲

RACE RED #E10600

Base phase · 38 days to Nationals

+7▲

PALMARÈS GOLD #C7A020

Flamme is urgent and modern (race signage). Race Red is classical and aggressive (world champion bands, Ferrari). Gold says palmarès and podiums but whispers where the others shout. One accent only, everywhere.

Form · Fresh, good day to go hard

A note from Maria

Six weeks of quiet work and it's starting to show. Today's the day we ask for something back: 3×12 at threshold, and I want the last one to feel like the first.

64

Fitness · CTL

Fatigue · ATL

9h 20

This week

287W

FTP

04b · The coach, as correspondence · no chat bubbles, editorial thread

Maria FRIDAY 4 JULY · 07:42

You

Legs felt heavy on the climb yesterday. Slept badly, work is chaos this week. Should I still do today's threshold session?

Maria

No. And here's why I'm sure: your resting heart rate has been up three mornings running, and the last time work did this to you, in March, we pushed through and lost a full week. We're not making that mistake twice. Easy hour today, threshold moves to Sunday. The plan bends, the goal doesn't.

PLAN UPDATED · THRESHOLD 3×12 MOVED TO SUN 6 JUL

The chat sheds its bubbles and becomes correspondence: sender kickers, hairline rules, full-width prose. The memory shows itself in the content ("the last time work did this to you, in March"), and plan changes are receipted in mono like a race communiqué.

The full-block zone cells survive from ALMANAC, re-cut in the race ramp. Today gets the only Flamme on the page: a hairline outline, nothing more.

07 · Presence · the frosted orb system, four families

01 · THE AI COACH

the brain, in flamme · the red full stop of the wordmark, alive inside the orb · a flamme core glowing as an internal light source, moving as you converse — bouncing, spinning, pulsing

THE MIND · flamme core, the brain, colour as a light source

THE MIND · dark mode, flamme glowing from within

02 · TRAINING ZONES

one vessel · distortion and colour rise with intensity, Z1 to Z7

REST · a still perfect sphere, clear glass, subtle blue-green nucleus, Z1

ENDURANCE · lightly pressed, soft feathered blue nucleus, Z2

TEMPO · more pressed than endurance, dark green core, Z3

EFFORT · dented under load, Z4 amber

SPRINT · crushed into soft peaks, Z6 crimson

MAX EFFORT · crushed beyond sprint, glowing core, anaerobic, Z7 magenta

03 · MECHANICS

the instruments · heart rate, power, cadence

HEART RATE · a pulse in soft concentric rings, red

POWER · three stems of light from the core, orange

CADENCE · a spinning circle, glass twisting, green

One vessel, four families. Every image is the same frosted glass orb in the same studio. The Coach is a mind of light; the Training Zones read intensity through how far the sphere is pressed from round and where it sits on the zone colour ramp; the Events are the orb reshaped into the race (a mountain, a spinning time-trial); the Mechanics are the live instruments (heart rate, power, cadence). Calm, ownable, unlike any stock library.

04 · INFINITY RENDERS · CHALK

the full set on brand chalk #F0F0EC · backgrounds flattened to the exact brand colour, edges fade to flat chalk · shadows and reflections fully in frame, never clipped · orbs normalised to one scale · place on any chalk surface and they melt in

05 · INFINITY RENDERS · CARBON

the same set on carbon #101012 for ride mode and dark surfaces · same rules: exact brand colour to every edge, glow compact, nothing clipped

THE MIND

REST

ENDURANCE

TEMPO

EFFORT

SPRINT

MAX EFFORT

HEART RATE

POWER

CADENCE

Three formats per orb. Original studio renders (light and dark), infinity renders on chalk and carbon that blend invisibly into brand surfaces, and transparent cutouts for free composition. The infinity renders are the working format: drop them straight onto a chalk or carbon page, no masking, no boxes.

06 · The brand's public face — journal & waitlist

FORMA JOURNAL

ISSUE 001 · SUMMER 2026

Why your coach forgets you, and what we built instead.

Words by Gareth Winter, founder · 12 min read

100.

That's the club.

FORMA takes one hundred founding members. A coach with a memory, a plan that bends around your life, and a founder you can reply to. When the hundred places are gone, the doors close.
